items.title: Implement generator-evaluator testing framework
items.problem_statement: The coordinator has 105+ interfaces (35 HTTP, 39 MCP, 31 CLI) with no cross-interface consistency testing, no adversarial multi-agent scenarios, no live MCP server testing, and no LLM-generated edge cases. A fully planned OpenSpec change (gen-eval-testing, 56 tasks) exists but has 0 tasks started.
items.why_now: Only active OpenSpec change with work remaining. Fully planned with validated proposal, design, specs, tasks, and work-packages. All infrastructure dependencies (Docker lifecycle, live service testing, SDK dispatch, hybrid merge strategy) shipped. No blockers remain.

items.title: Add CORS middleware and /ready endpoint to coordination API
items.problem_statement: Two beads tasks ready (act-58o, act-99c): CORS middleware for cross-origin API access and /ready endpoint for orchestration health checks. Both are standard production-readiness improvements that gen-eval-testing will benefit from.
items.recommended_action: bd update act-58o --status=in_progress, then implement both tasks
items.why_now: Zero blockers, small scope. /ready endpoint directly supports gen-eval-testing live service verification.

items.title: Consolidate and deduplicate skill infrastructure
items.problem_statement: The skill-consolidation spec has 11 requirements but no active change. Skills have grown organically — some share patterns (review dispatch, DAG scheduling, consensus) that could be extracted into shared infrastructure. install.sh syncs to 4 runtimes but the sync/testing model has rough edges.
items.recommended_action: /plan-feature 'Consolidate skill infrastructure per skill-consolidation spec (11 requirements)'
items.why_now: Growing skill count (40+) makes consolidation increasingly valuable. Each new skill inherits pattern inconsistencies.

items.title: Reduce merge conflict surface through architectural separation
items.problem_statement: Multiple agents editing the same files creates merge conflicts even when changes are logically independent. Fresh architecture data now available (refreshed today). Needs hotspot analysis from git blame/merge-conflict history to identify worst offenders.
items.recommended_action: /plan-feature 'Analyze and refactor merge conflict hotspots for parallel agent isolation'
items.why_now: Architecture analysis freshly refreshed. Hybrid merge strategy shipped. Good time to identify structural improvements while parallel execution patterns are actively used.

items.title: Complete behavioral verification suite for coordinator
items.problem_statement: No property tests, behavioral verification, or differential testing (Cedar vs native policy engine). Gen-eval-testing will cover live behavioral verification, but dedicated property tests for edge cases remain unaddressed.
items.recommended_action: defer — gen-eval-testing covers much of this through live-service testing
items.why_now: Wait for gen-eval-testing results to assess remaining verification gaps.

items.title: Add observability dashboards and alerting for coordinator
items.problem_statement: Observability spec has 5 requirements. OTEL instrumentation was added recently (add-otel-observability) but no dashboards, alerting rules, or SLO definitions exist yet. Running gen-eval workloads will need observability to interpret results.
items.recommended_action: defer — ship gen-eval-testing first, then build dashboards around observed metrics
items.why_now: OTEL instrumentation exists but lacks visualization layer. Lower priority until gen-eval produces workloads worth observing.
